input.content:
# Markdown Parsing Heuristics for Slide Generation

---


# Slide Break Detection
- Horizontal rules (`---`) commonly signal slide boundaries
- Consistent use of `---` separates content into discrete slides
- Some tools support vertical slide splits with `--` or custom separators
- Proper spacing and no extra spaces around separators improve parsing accuracy

---


# Header Levels & Slide Structure
- Top-level headers (`#`) usually define slide titles or new sections
- Secondary headers (`##`, `###`) can create sub-slides or content hierarchy
- Parsing heuristics treat headers as natural slide start points
- Header-based splitting helps organize content flow and navigation

---


# Content Density & Layout Heuristics
- Slide generators analyze text length to adjust font size or layout
- Dense content may trigger multi-column layouts or smaller fonts
- Images and code blocks influence slide formatting decisions
- Heuristics optimize readability and visual balance automatically
